items.summary: With this Memorial Day deal, AT&T is offering new and existing customers the 2026 Razr+ flip phone for just $4.43 per month. Here's what to know.

items.summary: Salesforce has a problem that no amount of marketing can fix. items.summary: These Memorial Day deals on Meta smart glasses include the second-gen Ray-Bans and the Oakley HSTN models at some of the lowest prices we've seen.

items.title: Wingtech sues Nexperia in Chinese court over Dutch government’s semiconductor seizure
items.summary: Wingtech Technology has filed a lawsuit against its own subsidiary, Nexperia, in a Chinese court. The case, lodged at the Dongguan Intermediate People’s Court, seeks at least 8 billion yuan, roughly $1.1 billion, in damages. items.summary: These gadgets aren't going to make or break your home office, but they're huge upgrades for my workflow - and most are on sale for Memorial Day.

items.title: Norway’s $2.3 trillion wealth fund objects to John Elkann’s reappointment to Meta’s board
items.summary: Norway’s Government Pension Fund Global, the world’s largest sovereign wealth fund, has withheld its vote on the reappointment of John Elkann to Meta’s board of directors.
